# kinsta_database (Resource)

!> **Warning:** This resource is **DEPRECATED** and will be removed in version 2.0.0. The MyKinsta databases API has been deprecated in favor of the Sevalla API.

## Migration to Sevalla

Please migrate to the `sevalla_database` resource from the `terraform-provider-sevalla` provider:

```hcl
# Old (deprecated)
resource "kinsta_database" "example" {
  name         = "mydb"
  display_name = "My Database"
  region       = "us-central1"
  db_type      = "postgresql"
  version      = "15"
  size         = "db-n1-standard-1"
}

# New (recommended)
terraform {
  required_providers {
    sevalla = {
      source  = "REPLACE_ME/sevalla"
      version = "~> 1.0"
    }
  }
}

resource "sevalla_database" "example" {
  display_name  = "My Database"
  type          = "postgresql"
  version       = "15"
  resource_type = "db-n1-standard-1"
  region        = "us-central1"
  
  # Required: explicit password management
  external_root_password = var.db_password
}
```

### Migration Steps

1. Install the Sevalla provider
2. Create equivalent `sevalla_database` resources
3. Import existing databases into Sevalla provider state: `terraform import sevalla_database.example <database_id>`
4. Remove `kinsta_database` resources from state: `terraform state rm kinsta_database.example`
5. Remove `kinsta_database` blocks from your configuration

For more information, see the [Sevalla provider documentation](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/sevalla/sevalla).
